items.title: Partner of US influencer who died in Zanzibar speaking to police as witness
items.dek: The police said Ashly Robinson, known online as Ashlee Jenae, had died after attempting to take her own life.
items.body: The police said Ashly Robinson, known online as Ashlee Jenae, had died after attempting to take her own life.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Ex-Michigan coach Moore avoids jail in sentencing
items.dek: Former Michigan football coach Sherrone Moore was sentenced to 18 months' probation Tuesday for misdemeanors related to a confrontation with his executive assis
items.body: Former Michigan football coach Sherrone Moore was sentenced to 18 months' probation Tuesday for misdemeanors related to a confrontation with his executive assistant.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Russini resigns from Athletic following Vrabel pics
items.dek: NFL reporter Dianna Russini has resigned from The Athletic less than a week after published photos of her and Patriots coach Mike Vrabel at an Arizona resort pr
items.body: NFL reporter Dianna Russini has resigned from The Athletic less than a week after published photos of her and Patriots coach Mike Vrabel at an Arizona resort prompted an internal investigation at the New York Times-owned sports outlet.
items.author: IriLine Desk
